name: Control Objectives for Information and Related Technologies
description: ISACA's COBIT — governance and management framework for enterprise IT. COBIT 2019 is the current version. Widely used in IT audit and IT governance practices.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
